form.label: Operational Risk & Stability
form.description: Assess operational risk and system stability by analysing error concentration, volatility, and consistency over time. This dashboard focuses on identifying systemic weaknesses rather than short-lived anomalies.

input.label: Select the index containing log data.

chart.title: Quantifies overall operational stability by combining event volume volatility and error rate fluctuations. Higher values indicate more consistent and predictable system behavior.
Highlights hosts responsible for a disproportionate share of errors. High concentration may indicate single points of failure or unhealthy nodes.

search.query: `ops_base_search($index$)` | where is_error=1 | stats count AS error_count BY extracted_host | sort - error_count | head 10

chart.title: Shows how operational risk is distributed across services, helping prioritise investigation and remediation efforts.

search.query: `ops_base_search($index$)` | where is_error=1 | stats count AS error_count BY service | sort - error_count

chart.title: Detects instability patterns caused by inconsistent event rates, even when overall traffic volume appears normal.

search.query: index=$index$ | timechart span=1h count | streamstats window=5 stdev(count) AS volatility

table.title: Classifies hosts into Low, Medium, or High operational risk based on observed error rate, enabling targeted remediation.

search.query: `ops_base_search($index$)` | stats count AS events sum(is_error) AS errors BY extracted_host | eval error_rate = round((errors/events)*100, 2) | eval risk_level = case( error_rate > 20, "High", error_rate > 10, "Medium", true(), "Low" ) | sort - error_rate
